blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No visible water stains or discoloration affecting the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds are present that distort the text.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off, and the image frame includes all necessary portions.

missing_sections.description: All parts of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obscure the document content.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is non-compliant due to missing mandatory fields such as date of issue, supplier name, total amount, and expense type. Additionally, there are missing documentation requirements including business purpose documentation, legible receipts, and manager approval.
